hero.sub: Operating on-premise infrastructure and building factory ERP systems

about.label: ABOUT ME
body1: I build the systems that keep factories running — from
to the interfaces operators use on the floor. My work sits at the intersection of
and software that actually gets used.
body2: , currently focused on ERP systems for discrete manufacturing. I care about software that lasts, hardware that doesn't fail quietly, and

body2.text: documentation that future-you will thank you for

bullets: Designed and maintained on-premise server infrastructure for factory sites
Built ERP modules for production scheduling, inventory, and quality control
Reduced line-downtime incidents through real-time monitoring pipelines

skills.name: Next.js
skills.desc: React framework with server-side rendering, file-based routing, and built-in optimizations for production.

skills.name: Tailwind
skills.desc: Utility-first CSS framework — style elements directly in HTML using small, composable class names.

skills.name: PostgreSQL
skills.desc: Powerful open-source relational database. Reliable, feature-rich, and handles complex queries well.

skills.name: Docker
skills.desc: Packages apps and their dependencies into containers so they run identically on any machine.

skills.name: Proxmox
skills.desc: Open-source virtualization platform for managing VMs and containers on bare-metal servers.

skills.name: Git
skills.desc: Version control system. Tracks every change to code, enables collaboration, and prevents losing work.

skills.name: Figma
skills.desc: Collaborative design tool for building UI mockups, prototypes, and design systems.
